title: Wild Rift Patch Notes 5.0b
paragraphs: Surprise! We are back two weeks early! We just missed y’all too much. The things announced with the last patch notes will still come out as scheduled (like Talon coming on the 23rd), and we still have lots more in store for you this patch! Fun new events, and your regularly scheduled champion changes. Welcome to patch 5.0b.
Reminder: content will be released throughout the patch.

A brand new event is coming up where you can play through missions, gift friends rewards, collect login lanterns, and try out a new mini-game! Join us under the crescent moon, bring a friend and we will see you on the Rift!
The Together Under The Crescent event begins March 8 at 00:01 UTC

Who’s ready for double trouble? Double Cast is a whole new way to experience your favorite skills! Now, you can cast the same skill twice, setting up some epic combos. Grease up your fingers and prepare for faster and more thrilling battles!

Crown of the Shattered Queen has made mages way too safe with little counterplay. We are changing the damage reduction effect. Now players will have to exercise more decision-making when it comes to their positioning during teamfights.
